history.summary: Mistake book, real-board practice entry, TestFlight checklist, Game Center preparation, and stronger App Store marketing materials.
First-run onboarding, daily endgame and mate-in-one training, account deletion, and App Store-safe cloud backup visibility.
Release status now correctly detects the local owner-only entry while keeping player builds clean.
Release status refreshes after the local owner-entry check and cache versions were bumped so players receive the latest resources.
Release status now shows admin-entry exposure, and safe player profile cloud backup is available on the Netlify main site.
Developer rank restore now stays hidden on normal player pages and only appears in explicit local admin-check mode.
Prominent LAN failure diagnostics with one-click copy, safer profile export/import for future cloud backup, and refreshed App Store submission materials.
LAN preflight checks for room code, server status, current page source, clearer GitHub backup guidance, and stronger same-Wi-Fi QR warnings.
Safe player profile export reminders plus App Store asset readiness checks before public release.
Public player asset minification and public-repository safety audits for current files and git history.
Terminal virtual LAN dual-client testing plus reconnect color reclaim for fast reconnects.
LAN auto-reconnect, reconnect button, peer version display, QR lifetime hints, and real LAN automation coverage.
Clearer LAN diagnostics, QR image copy/download, scan limits, and a retained v1.0.28 compatibility test pack.
Version-tolerant LAN compatibility metadata so different game versions can still use room codes and QR invites.
Scan-to-duel LAN QR card for faster two-player room invites.
Backup feedback copy/email options plus automated version-center share checks.
Backup-route cloud feature notice plus public player sharing link and QR code.
README files, one-click public player publishing, and clearer GitHub Pages backup status.
Backup GitHub Pages site moved to the separate public player repository while the main repository stays private.
GitHub Pages next-step hints, PWA install guidance, online self-check, and profile import preview.
Offline PWA support, release status panel, share-package launch page, and player profile export/import.
Backup GitHub Pages link, read-me-first share package note, one-command release controller, and mobile version-center polish.
GitHub Pages backup publishing, one-click clean player share package, and live-site status checks.
Continue-last-game prompt, game goals, family/friend records, invalid drag feedback, and clearer live-version hints.
Sound test buttons, clearer browser sound hints, Pro League my rank and season reward badges, tutorial stars, and smoother mobile dragging.
Separate volume sliders, online Professional League leaderboard, 7-day seasons, smarter review advice, and training-style tutorials.
Piece lines now play matching musical voice cues.
Hard and stronger AI now avoid pointless repeated checks.
Standalone leaderboard with overall, rank, and Professional League boards.
Professional League AI is locked above professional level.
Professional League mode with account points and leaderboard.
Selective restore, rank migration confirmation, health icons, feedback IDs, and LAN guidance.
Profile backups, restore hints, version health checks, and initial official rank migration.
Protect local rank points from empty official rank profiles after updates.
Automatic update hints, resource date, version history, and safer update restore.
Version center with one-click resource update.
90 BPM thinking music.
Official online rank profiles and server rank storage.
